allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "d:\\jv\\Documents\\UFF 2025\\Bolsa Agir\\Tecnologia Social\\Portal LISA\\.claude\\settings.json" -Raw; $json = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($json.hooks.PostToolUse[0].hooks[0].command\) { Write-Host "✓ Hook válido:" \($json.hooks.PostToolUse[0].hooks[0].command\) } else { Write-Host "✗ Erro no hook" })

PowerShell(3000..3006 | ForEach-Object { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "Portas limpas.")

Bash(mv "d:\\jv\\Documents\\UFF 2025\\Bolsa Agir\\Tecnologia Social\\Portal LISA\\portal-lisa-app\\.git" "d:\\jv\\Documents\\UFF 2025\\Bolsa Agir\\Tecnologia Social\\Portal LISA\\portal-lisa-app-git-backup" 2>&1 && echo "ok")

PowerShell($envFile = "d:\\jv\\Documents\\UFF 2025\\Bolsa Agir\\Tecnologia Social\\Portal LISA\\portal-lisa-app\\.env.local"; if \(Test-Path $envFile\) { $content = Get-Content $envFile; $lines = @\($content | Where-Object {$_ -match '='} | Where-Object {-not $_.StartsWith\('#'\)}\); Write-Host "Variáveis configuradas: $\($lines.Count\)"; $lines | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^\([A-Z_]+\)='\) { Write-Host "- $\($matches[1]\)" } } } else { Write-Host "Arquivo não encontrado" })

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "✓ Build bem-sucedido! Pronto para deploy em produção? Execute: vercel deploy --prod"}'
